account.title: Account Information
account.logoutDescription: Sign out of your account on this device.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.languageDescription: Choose your preferred language for the interface.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
dangerZone.confirmDescription: This will permanently delete your entire account including your profile, skills, stories, projects, job experiences, education, chat history, exports, LinkedIn analyses, credit wallet, and all other data. This action is irreversible.
dangerZone.confirmInstruction: Type DELETE MY ACCOUNT to confirm:
dangerZone.mismatch: Confirmation text does not match. Please type exactly: DELETE MY ACCOUNT

ai.title: AI Provider Settings
ai.description: Configure which AI model powers your public profile assistant.
ai.providerHelp: Select which AI provider to use for your assistant chat.
ai.chatModelHelp: Override the default model for the selected provider. Leave empty to use the provider's default.
